summary: A vintage-graded Christmas montage set to music, built from warm, grainy home-movie-style footage: a laughing red-haired toddler amid torn wrapping paper, a boy in plaid pajamas and round glasses hugging a large red-and-green wrapped gift, an abstract glowing warm-toned shot, a figure cradling a burst of golden light, and a retro film clip of Earth from space with a yellow 'MERRY CHRISTMAS' title. Audio is a music bed; the tweet text reads 'We are blessed to share a nation and a Savior.'

script.scene: Grainy, warm home-movie-style shot of a laughing red-haired toddler standing among torn Christmas wrapping paper and toys, an adult hand reaching toward a red gift.
Vintage-toned shot of a boy in plaid pajamas and round glasses smiling as he hugs a large red gift with a green ribbon and bow.
Soft, abstract warm-amber glowing close-up with film-grain styling.
Shot of a figure in winter clothing cradling a burst of golden light/sparkles against a snowy backdrop.
Retro film clip of planet Earth seen from space against black, with yellow caption 'MERRY CHRISTMAS' across the bottom.

notable_text: Merry Christmas, America. We are blessed to share a nation and a Savior.
